locations.name: 史蒂瑞
locations.summary: 史蒂瑞（英語：Joseph Beal Steere，1842年2月9日—1940年12月7日），是一位美國鳥類學家。 生平 史蒂瑞出生於密歇根州羅林鎮區 (密歇根州)是威廉·米爾豪斯和伊麗莎白·克萊格霍恩（比爾）·斯蒂爾的兒子。他成功獲得…

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 米沙鄢群島
locations.summary: 米沙鄢群島（米沙鄢語：Kabisay-an，本地發音：[kabiˈsajʔan]；菲律賓語：Kabisayaan，發音：[kɐbɪsɐˈjaʔan]，又譯维萨亚斯群岛、比沙雅群島或未獅耶群島）位於菲律賓中部，是當地三大島群之一。東鄰菲律賓…

locations.name: 保和省
locations.summary: 保和省，或称薄荷省（宿霧語：Lalawigan sa Bohol；他加祿語：Lalawigan ng Bohol）是菲律賓中米沙鄢大區下的一個省份，由保和島（或称薄荷島）和75个小岛组成，首府為塔比拉蘭市。 保和省为一级收入省份，分为3个…

locations.name: 莱特岛
locations.summary: 雷伊泰島（Leyte）是菲律賓群島中的米沙鄢群島的島嶼之一。面積7213平方公里。北臨薩馬海；東北隔聖華尼科海峽與薩馬島相望，兩島有跨海大橋相連；南面為棉蘭老海，與棉蘭老島相望；西南為保和島；西為宿霧島；西北為馬斯巴特島。 第二次世界大戰…

locations.name: 薩馬島
locations.summary: 薩馬島 （英語：Samar）位於菲律賓中部，是米沙鄢群島最東的島嶼。下分三省：北薩馬省、東薩馬省和薩馬省。这三个省是東米沙鄢政區的一部分，莱特岛和比利兰岛是附近的岛屿省份。薩馬島面積13,429平方公里，是菲律宾的第三大岛，仅次于吕宋岛和…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Northern silvery kingfisher
relations.evidence: The northern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx flumenicola) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines being found in the Visayas on the islands of Bohol, Leyte and Samar

relations.subject: Northern silvery kingfisher
relations.evidence: Current laws protecting riverine habitats are weak and require revision. It is found in the Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol, Samar Island Natural Park on Samar, Kuapnit Balinsasayao National Park on Leyte but actual protection from deforestation are lax

relations.subject: Northern silvery kingfisher
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are tropical moist lowland forests, streams and rivers. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Northern silvery kingfisher
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Northern silvery kingfisher
relations.evidence: Tree-cutting, agricultural expansion, including pesticide (specifically Carbofuran) contamination from commercial growing of banana, and soil erosion are all threats to Rajah Sikatuna National Park (Bohol), a key sites for the species
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
